summary: Taiki has flipped from a months-long bearish stance to explicitly calling a market bottom, arguing that Bitcoin is poised for higher prices.
narrative: After aggressively shorting Ethereum throughout late 2025, his latest analysis signals a decisive regime change where he believes the market is bottoming. He specifically points to new marginal buyers and critiques the 4-Year Cycle theory to support his thesis that the upward trend is resuming.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
